title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 6 - 2017: On Flagstaff Mt. w/ Pyramid of Giza at 30th & Arapahoe

enrichment.summary: Kyle films his first green screen video from his Boulder apartment, testing the setup and discussing his new lighting rig, plans to learn Adobe Premiere, and future vlog content. He is casually rambling, acknowledges he is high, and troubleshoots green screen shadow issues caused by unironed fabric.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to keep shirt off for all future videos as part of his style
Admits he is high and can't think straight, treating it casually
Identifies shadows as caused by unironed folds and fixes it by tightening hooks

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is his first green screen video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had an operation to remove a big cyst.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He feels he looks like a 'fat fuck' without his shirt on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to do all his videos shirtless.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is sitting on the toilet while recording.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is figuring out the layout of Premiere for his videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is high and that's why he can't think of anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is organizing his store and setting up lights.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He ordered Lapse shades online and they have already shipped.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He can start dancing and doing shows in his videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He will show his setup later, including his things and canals.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has lights in front of him and above him, with clear ones behind him.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He mentions 'Virginia cake confirmed by the three wise men' as one of his video ideas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is testing his green screen and notices too many shadows.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He folded some of the green screen to reduce shadows.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He tightened the green screen with hooks to minimize folds and shadows.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He did not iron the green screen, which caused some shadows.
